not_ready_for: Gameplay Ability System internals and ability-task flow
CommonUI widget tree and activation-policy authoring
GameFeature activation and experience architecture recreation
verdict.editor_open_reason: Static class ancestry extraction found high-confidence ParentClass/NativeParentClass tags for Blueprint-like assets.

control_flow_expression_authoring.label: Blueprint graph control flow and expressions
control_flow_expression_authoring.note: MCP can author common graph constructs, but arbitrary C++ expression lowering remains heuristic.

basic_actor_component_authoring.label: Actor and component composition
basic_actor_component_authoring.note: Blueprint shells and component setup are feasible when behavior is simple and component classes already exist.

enhanced_input.label: Enhanced Input
enhanced_input.note: Event node authoring exists; full asset/data migration and trigger/modifier semantics need separate handling.

blueprint_exposed_api.label: Blueprint-exposed native API
blueprint_exposed_api.note: Existing MCP tools can call exposed functions and author graph glue, but native implementations remain native.

reflected_api.label: Reflected Unreal API surface
reflected_api.note: Reflection macros can be inventoried and partially mapped to Blueprint shells, variables, and callable nodes.

common_ui_umg.label: CommonUI and UMG
common_ui_umg.note: UMG wrappers help, but CommonUI activation/layer policy and widget trees need dedicated analyzer support.

gameplay_ability_system.label: Gameplay Ability System
gameplay_ability_system.note: Blueprint children and glue may be feasible, but core ASC, attributes, prediction, and ability tasks remain native-heavy.

delegates_async_latent.label: Delegates, async actions, and latent flow
delegates_async_latent.note: Binding and callback topology are detectable, but robust delegate/event authoring needs more MCP graph primitives.

subsystems_lifecycle.label: Subsystem and lifecycle orchestration
subsystems_lifecycle.note: Lifecycle hooks can be called around, but authoritative subsystem behavior should remain native or get explicit support.

gameplay_tags.label: Gameplay Tags
gameplay_tags.note: Tags can be referenced through exposed APIs; tag table authoring and semantic migration are separate concerns.

data_assets_and_registry.label: Data assets and data registries
data_assets_and_registry.note: Asset classes can be discovered; data asset creation/editing needs editor-side asset tooling beyond graph authoring.

slate_editor_cpp.label: Slate and editor-only C++
slate_editor_cpp.note: Editor modules and Slate widgets should be classified out of runtime BP conversion scope.

networking_replication.label: Networking and replication
networking_replication.note: Replication policy, prediction, RPC authority, and replication graph behavior are not safe to auto-lower to BP.

game_features_modular_gameplay.label: Game Features and Modular Gameplay
game_features_modular_gameplay.note: Plugin activation, experience loading, and component injection are project architecture concerns, not just BP graph authoring.

custom_k2_native_extensions.label: Custom K2 and native graph extensions
custom_k2_native_extensions.note: Custom K2 node behavior is native editor extension code and cannot be recreated by generic BP authoring alone.

mcp_gaps: generic delegate lifecycle authoring for non-Event-Dispatcher targets
async proxy node authoring with callback exec pins
latent call validation exists only as opt-in function-call creation, not full continuation topology
UMG event binding exists, but it is widget-specific and not a generic delegate solution

next_reinforcement_candidates.name: Native/arbitrary delegate lifecycle and async callback primitives
next_reinforcement_candidates.why: Lyra source shows 106 delegate bind/assign/unbind triggers, 144 lifecycle sites that still require native retention, wrapper APIs, or explicit unbind policy, and 13 async proxy classes requiring callback exec or native policy; Blueprint Event Dispatcher lifecycle is now covered, but native delegates, arbitrary delegate targets, and async callback topology still need reinforcement.

next_reinforcement_candidates.name: CommonUI/UMG structure inventory
next_reinforcement_candidates.why: Asset ancestry found 171 CommonUI/UMG Blueprint-like assets.

next_reinforcement_candidates.name: GameplayAbility-specific classifier
next_reinforcement_candidates.why: Asset ancestry found 37 ability Blueprints plus GAS-heavy C++ patterns.

next_reinforcement_candidates.name: Animation Blueprint read-only graph inventory
next_reinforcement_candidates.why: Asset ancestry found 27 animation-related Blueprint assets; current MCP generic graph tools are not AnimGraph tools.

next_reinforcement_candidates.name: Optional Editor Asset Registry verification
next_reinforcement_candidates.why: Use only if exact Unreal AssetRegistry class names or Blueprint graph counts are needed beyond static package tag extraction.
